A company that produces polyester and nylon filaments. It is 
a pioneer in the manufacture of microfiber-based cleaning 
products under the MICROLIMPIA brand. Its investment in 
plastic recycling innovation has made it a leader in bringing 
the circular economy to Ecuador.
Universidad San Francisco de Quito USFQ is a liberal-arts, 
private university located in Quito, Ecuador.
